subject: Cloud Computing
title: What Comes After the Cloud?
description: A quick win: understand What Comes After the Cloud?.

hook.text: Mainframes led to PCs. PCs led to the internet. The internet led to cloud. What paradigm comes next?

buildup.text: Some say spatial computing: AR and VR powered by edge and cloud. Others say biological computing or neuromorphic chips.

discovery.text: Quantum networking could enable a quantum internet where entangled particles transmit information instantaneously.

twist.text: Maybe the answer isn't one next thing. Maybe it's all of them converging into a computing fabric we can't yet imagine.

climax.text: The cloud was just the beginning. Every computing generation seemed final — until the next revolution arrived.

punchline.text: Every era feels final. The next revolution is already brewing.

quiz.question: What lesson does computing history teach about the future?
options: Every computing paradigm that seemed permanent was eventually replaced by something new
Cloud computing is the final and permanent computing paradigm
Future computing will look exactly like today's cloud, only faster
